nodes.label: selectivity (trained probe - random projection)
nodes.description: The decisive metric for lost-vs-entangled: max-power readout on SCFF features minus the same readout on an untrained random projection of identical shape. Selectivity <= 0 means information is genuinely lost, not merely entangled (Hewitt & Liang 2019 probing critique).
nodes.rationale: Kept permanently after it 'saved' Phase 2 from mis-routing on a naive gap-vs-ceiling reading that straddled the 0.05 threshold.

nodes.label: depth-slope metric
nodes.description: Linear-fit slope of per-layer linear probe vs layer index; positive = depth helps. The one-number headline for Phase 2 depth curves, carried into Phase 3/4.
